sections.paragraph:
Original: מעי

Transliteration: mâ‛ay

Phonetic: maw-ah'-ee

BDB Definition:

Maai = "compassionate"
  1. one of the sons of Asaph who took part in the musical service at the dedication of the wall of Jerusalem

Origin: probably from H4578

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
